description: Case Style: Analog and digital watch with a plastic case and bezel, has a stainless steel back on the case Dial Style: Digital and analog display with digital display blocks, with eand black coloured hands and white coloured hour marks Features: Screw and four buttons to reset time, has backlight, mode selection, alarm, dual time, birthday settings, countdown and stop-watch, Strap Style: Stainless steel bracelet style strap with a butterfly clasp Water resistant up to 5 BAR Warranty: 1 year
